title: Salarpuria Sattva Global Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Salarpuria Sattva Global Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
We at Salarpuria Sattva Global Group are looking for an experienced Senior Property Advisor based out of Ranchi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Salarpuria Sattva Global Group:
Salarpuria Sattva Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Valuation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Salarpuria Sattva Global Group!
